message:
refactor: Add mod_helper.zig and convert 19 module files

Introduce shared module helper with common types and comptime generators:
- h.H: ModuleHandler type alias
- h.c(): Constant string generator
- h.I32/I64/U8/U32/F64(): Numeric type generators
- h.err(): Error type generator
- h.pass(): Passthrough generator

Converted files save ~6-7 lines each by eliminating boilerplate.
Total reduction: 9228 → 9083 lines (145 lines saved)
